description: ol-style-name-case (issue #115): a `map`/`filter`/`reduce` comprehension keyword written non-lowercase (`MAP`) is flagged too. `ComprehensionNode.form` only ever stores the canonical lowercase spelling the parser normalizes to (never the literal source casing), so this check works by slicing `source` at the node's own span start, keyed off `form`'s length rather than a static per-kind keyword.
